lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਕਾਜਲ ਕੋਠੜੀ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਦੇਹ ਸੁਆਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag kaajal kottharree tan man deh suaaeh |
lines.english: The whole world is a store-house of lamp-black; the body and mind are blackened with it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ਭਾਹਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur raakhe se niramale sabad nivaaree bhaeh |7|
lines.english: Those who are saved by the Guru are immaculate and pure; through the Word of the Shabad, they extinguish the fire of desire. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਵੇਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: mai har naam na veesarai har naam ratan vesaahu |
lines.english: May I never forget the Name of the Lord! I have purchased the Jewel of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਰੀਐ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਾਹਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak tareeai sach naam sir saahaa paatisaahu |
lines.english: O Nanak, they swim across with the True Name of the Lord, the King above the heads of kings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭਉਜਲਿ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਰੇ ਅਥਾਹੁ ॥੮॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: manamukh bhaujal pach mue guramukh tare athaahu |8|16|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs putrefy and die in the terrifying world-ocean, while the Gurmukhs cross over the bottomless ocean. ||8||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਾਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਸਣਾ ਨਿਤ ਚਲਣੈ ਕੀ ਧੋਖ ॥
lines.translit: mukaam kar ghar baisanaa nit chalanai kee dhokh |
lines.english: They have made this their resting place and they sit at home, but the urge to depart is always there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਾਮੁ ਤਾ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਲੋਕ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mukaam taa par jaaneeai jaa rahai nihachal lok |1|
lines.english: This would be known as a lasting place of rest, only if they were to remain stable and unchanging. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸਿਦਕੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਖਰਚੁ ਬਾਧਹੁ ਲਾਗਿ ਰਹੁ ਨਾਮੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar sidak karanee kharach baadhahu laag rahu naame |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Doing deeds of faith, pack up the supplies for your journey, and remain committed to the Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਕੈਸਿ ਮੁਕਾਮੇ ॥
lines.translit: duneea kais mukaame |
lines.english: What sort of a resting place is this world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਤ ਆਸਣੁ ਕਰਿ ਬਹੈ ਮੁਲਾ ਬਹੈ ਮੁਕਾਮਿ ॥
lines.translit: jogee ta aasan kar bahai mulaa bahai mukaam |
lines.english: The Yogis sit in their Yogic postures, and the Mullahs sit at their resting stations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਪੋਥੀਆ ਸਿਧ ਬਹਹਿ ਦੇਵ ਸਥਾਨਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: panddit vakhaaneh potheea sidh baheh dev sathaan |2|
lines.english: The Hindu Pandits recite from their books, and the Siddhas sit in the temples of their gods. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰ ਸਿਧ ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਸੇਖ ਪੀਰ ਸਲਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sur sidh gan gandharab mun jan sekh peer salaar |
lines.english: The angels, Siddhas, worshippers of Shiva, heavenly musicians, silent sages, Saints, priests, preachers, spiritual teachers and commanders

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਕੂਚ ਕੂਚਾ ਕਰਿ ਗਏ ਅਵਰੇ ਭਿ ਚਲਣਹਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dar kooch koochaa kar ge avare bhi chalanahaar |3|
lines.english: -each and every one has left, and all others shall depart as well. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਲਤਾਨ ਖਾਨ ਮਲੂਕ ਉਮਰੇ ਗਏ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਕੂਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: sulataan khaan malook umare ge kar kar kooch |
lines.english: The sultans and kings, the rich and the mighty, have marched away in succession.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਾਹ ਮਾਹਿ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਤ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabadaah maeh vakhaaneeai viralaa ta boojhai koe |
lines.english: This is described in the Shabads; only a few understand this!

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੜੀ ਮੁਹਤਿ ਕਿ ਚਲਣਾ ਦਿਲ ਸਮਝੁ ਤੂੰ ਭਿ ਪਹੂਚੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gharree muhat ki chalanaa dil samajh toon bhi pahooch |4|
lines.english: In a moment or two, we shall also depart. O my heart, understand that you must go as well! ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak vakhaanai benatee jal thal maheeal soe |5|
lines.english: Nanak offers this prayer to the One who pervades the water, the land and the air. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਾਹੁ ਅਲਖੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਕਾਦਰੁ ਕਰਣਹਾਰੁ ਕਰੀਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: alaahu alakh agam kaadar karanahaar kareem |
lines.english: He is Allah, the Unknowable, the Inaccessible, All-powerful and Merciful Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਦੁਨੀ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਵਣੀ ਮੁਕਾਮੁ ਏਕੁ ਰਹੀਮੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sabh dunee aavan jaavanee mukaam ek raheem |6|
lines.english: All the world comes and goes-only the Merciful Lord is permanent. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਾਮੁ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਸਿ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਲੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: mukaam tis no aakheeai jis sis na hovee lekh |
lines.english: Call permanent only the One, who does not have destiny inscribed upon His Forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨ ਰਵਿ ਚਲੈ ਨਿਸਿ ਸਸਿ ਚਲੈ ਤਾਰਿਕਾ ਲਖ ਪਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: din rav chalai nis sas chalai taarikaa lakh paloe |
lines.english: The day and the sun shall pass away; the night and the moon shall pass away; the hundreds of thousands of stars shall disappear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਮਾਨੁ ਧਰਤੀ ਚਲਸੀ ਮੁਕਾਮੁ ਓਹੀ ਏਕੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: asamaan dharatee chalasee mukaam ohee ek |7|
lines.english: The sky and the earth shall pass away; He alone is permanent. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਾਮੁ ਓਹੀ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਚੁ ਬੁਗੋਇ ॥੮॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: mukaam ohee ek hai naanakaa sach bugoe |8|17|
lines.english: He alone is permanent; Nanak speaks the Truth. ||8||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲੇ ਪਹਿਲੇ ਸਤਾਰਹ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahale pahile sataarah asattapadeea |
lines.english: Seventeen Ashtpadheeyaa Of The First Mehl.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 ghar 1 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl, First House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਬੂਝੈ ਤਾ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapai aap milaae boojhai taa niramal hovai koe |
lines.english: One who merges his own self into Him understands, and so becomes pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕੀਜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh kripaa kare bhagat keejai bin gur bhagat na hoe |
lines.english: By God's Grace, the Gurmukh practices devotion; without the Guru, there is no devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har jeeo sachaa sachee baanee sabad milaavaa hoe |1|
lines.english: The Dear Lord is True, and True is the Word of His Bani. Through the Word of the Shabad, Union with Him is obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਭਗਤਿਹੀਣੁ ਕਾਹੇ ਜਗਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re bhagatiheen kaahe jag aaeaa |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, without devotion, why have people even come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ਨ ਕੀਨੀ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kee sev na keenee birathaa janam gavaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They have not served the Perfect Guru; they have wasted their lives in vain. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape har jagajeevan daataa aape bakhas milaae |
lines.english: The Lord Himself, the Life of the World, is the Giver. He Himself forgives, and unites us with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਏ ਕਿਆ ਵੇਚਾਰੇ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant e kiaa vechaare kiaa ko aakh sunaae |
lines.english: What are these poor beings and creatures? What can they speak and say?

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਲੋਭਾਣਾ ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dekh kuttanb mohi lobhaanaa chaladiaa naal na jaaee |
lines.english: Beholding your family, you are lured away by emotional attachment, but when you leave, they will not go with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵ ਕਰਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh aape de vaddiaaee aape sev karaae |2|
lines.english: God Himself grants glory to the Gurmukhs; He joins them to His Service. ||2||
